column1: Focus: Understanding current behavior and preparing the foundation.

column2: Data Review: Lead deep review of SGL data (freq/size/value).
column3: Data Extraction: Clean SGL data. Rank by orders/reliability.
column4: Research: Deep dive into companies with similar SGL models.
column5: Research: Deep dive into companies with similar SGL models.
column6: Research: Deep dive into companies with similar SGL models.

column2: Field Prep: Lead internal discussion on field observation goals.
column3: Field Visit: Conduct site visits to see how customers order in groups.
column4: Observation: Document how informal group leaders work in neighborhoods.
column5: Research: Deep dive into companies with similar SGL models.
column6: Scripting: Draft scripts for SGL Tutorial videos.

column2: Strategy: Prepare the Pickup Location Strategy document.
column3: Target ID: Identify high-frequency B2C customers who order for others.
column4: Synthesis: Summarize field observation insights & informal leader behavior.
column5: Prepare SGL designs slide how to tutorials
column6: Tutorials: Record voiceovers and screen-record tutorials for SGLs.

column2: Ops Sync: Discuss how Sales/Customer service teams will handle migration.
column3: Planning: Brainstorm pickup location project logistics with the Head.
column4: Benchmark: Finalize research report on similar business models.
column5: Finalize SGL designs slide how to tutorials
column6: Editing: Edit and finalize the first SGL Tutorial videos.

column2: Operating Model: Define who qualifies as an SGL (Rules/Criteria).
column3: Model Prep: Define min/max group sizes and ordering responsibilities.
column4: Value Prop: Draft SGL benefits (earnings, commission, status).
column5: Digital Flyer: Design "Earnings & Commission" digital flyer for SGLs.
column6: Content Prep: Prepare tutorial updates based on the new model rules.

column2: Delivery Flow: Define the bulk delivery flow from warehouse to SGL.
column3: Flow Mapping: Map out specific SGL duties from order to delivery.
column4: Value Prop: Draft customer benefits (price, delivery, convenience).
column5: Digital Flyer: Design "Neighbor Benefit" flyer (Save Money/Freshness).
column6: Video Edit: Create "How the Flow Works" short video for leaders.

column2: Finance Logic: Finalize 10% Margin logic and 5% Commission math.
column3: Site Activity: Plan the schedule for approaching customers for pickup spots.
column4: Copywriting: Finalize all Value Prop messaging for SGLs and Customers.
column5: Infographic: Design a digital flyer showing the 5% vs 10% logic.
column6: Video Edit: Finalize "Level 1" online onboarding video tutorial.

column2: Onboarding: Design Level 1 (Online) vs. Level-Up (In-person) structure.
column3: Outreach: Start site activity: Approach customers to become pickup leaders.
column4: Onboarding Copy: Write the training manual for "Level-Up" in-person training.
column5: Digital Flyer: Design "Level 1 Onboarding" step-by-step flyer.
column6: Video Edit: Create "Level-Up" training video snippets for WhatsApp.

column2: Site Review: Lead discussion on customer response to pickup location pitch.
column3: Migration Prep: Align with CS team on migration scripts and tools.
column4: Final Polish: Review and finalize all Value Prop and Model definitions.
column5: Digital Flyer: Design "Pickup Location" digital signage/stickers.
column6: Finalization: Ensure all Tutorial videos match the finalized logic.

column2: Wrap-Up: Prepare full strategy deck (Model, Math, Onboarding)
column3: Reporting: Consolidate site activity results and interest levels.
column4: Weekly Report: Update KPIs on SGL targets and Value Prop readiness.
column5: Asset Pack: Organize all digital flyers for the Sales team to use.
column6: Library: Finalize the full SGL Tutorial Video library.

column2: Validation: Present and validate the full SGL strategy with Leadership.
column3: Execution Prep: Prepare the internal execution plan for Sales/CS teams.
column4: Teaser Prep: Prepare promotion phase content based on the plan.
column5: Digital Flyer: Design "Special Launch Price" digital flyers.
column6: Capture: Film the "Validation Meeting" highlights for internal use.

column2: Strategy Approval: Get final approval to move to the Promotion Phase.
column3: System Sync: Align with Ops/Tech to ensure onboarding system is ready.
column4: Content Plan: Finalize the "Promotion Phase" social media schedule.
column5: Digital Flyer: Design flyers for the first 5 test pickup locations.
column6: Edit: Produce "Launching Tomorrow" teaser for social media.

column2: Ops Readiness: Final review of the execution plan (Onboarding, System, Ops).
column3: Site Prep: Coordinate with the first 5 SGL test locations.
column4: Communication: Draft the "Go-Live" SMS/Push notifications for B2C users.
column5: Digital Flyer: Design "How to order from your Leader" flyer.
column6: Prep: Prepare "Live Support" video clips for the pilot.

column2: Test Launch: Initiate the first test pickup location deliveries.
column3: Onboarding: Execute Level 1 & Level-Up onboarding for pilot leaders.
column4: Promotion: Launch first set of SGL promotion posts (Phase 1).
column5: Digital Flyer: Create real-time "Success" flyers for the pilot sites.
column6: Capture: Film the first successful pickup location delivery.

column2: Pilot Monitoring: Oversee pilot location flow and gather margin/ops data.
column3: Field Support: Provide on-site support at the first pickup locations.
column4: Engagement: Monitor responses to the promotion launch.
column5: Refinement: Adjust flyer designs based on pilot customer feedback.
column6: Capture: Record testimonials from the first pilot leaders.

column2: Pilot Review: Lead strategy review based on pilot test results.
column3: Execution Audit: Identify ops/system gaps from the pilot.
column4: Reporting: Prepare the pilot performance report for Leadership.
column5: Final Polish: Finalize the digital flyer templates for full scale-up.
column6: Pilot Wrap: Edit the "Pilot Success" proof-of-concept video.
